title: New Relic vs Sentry
description: Compare New Relic vs Sentry in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right developer tools tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Sentry emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.5/5 rating compared to 4.2/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, New Relic or Sentry?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Sentry edges ahead with a 4.5/5 rating. New Relic excels at Full-stack observability platform for monitoring and troubleshooting., while Sentry is stronger for Real-time error tracking and performance monitoring for developers.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between New Relic and Sentry?
faqs.answer: New Relic and Sentry differ in pricing ($0.25/hour vs Free–$26/user/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is New Relic cheaper than Sentry?
faqs.answer: New Relic starts at $0.25/hour while Sentry starts at Free–$26/user/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, New Relic or Sentry?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for developer tools. Sentry scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use New Relic and Sentry together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, New Relic or Sentry?
faqs.answer: Both New Relic and Sentry prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which developer tools tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor New Relic for large teams, while Sentry may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $0.25/hour pricing.
